methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $4M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 9 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

data.narrative:
SunDrive Solar is a Seed-stage company in Climate & Energy founded by Vince Allen and David Hu. The sector peer universe comprises 9 private companies and 1 public comparable (Linamar, ticker LNZA), though no private peers share identical stage and valuation characteristics that would support a robust peer-median analysis.

Given the absence of sufficient narrow-stage comparables, stage-progression methodology is the primary applicable lens. Using total capital raised ($60M+, inclusive of the A$25.3M ARENA grant in November 2025) as a proxy for historical valuation anchors at approximately $4M, a typical 2.5x step-up multiplier from Seed to the subsequent stage implies a valuation of $10M. The peer-median method is not applicable: while 9 same-sector peers exist in the Climate & Energy universe (including Helion, Redwood Materials, QuantumScape, KoBold Metals, and Electric Hydrogen), none satisfy the narrow filters of same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar valuation tier, making sector-wide median comparisons methodologically unreliable.

The triangulated valuation range is $8M to $12M, with a median of $10M supported exclusively by stage-progression logic. Key uncertainties include: (1) the appropriateness of the 2.5x multiplier to SunDrive's specific risk profile and market conditions; (2) the treatment of the ARENA grant as equity or non-dilutive capital; and (3) the lack of comparable transaction data within frontier solar technology. Additional peer data or transaction comps would materially strengthen confidence in this range.
